plan. If a product is part of two 
different tiers, this field is populated with the minimum tier value for the product. 

Starting in 2010, this variable is included in the formulary file (rather than the PDE file), and the 
variable description and values are maintained in the Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook. 

SHORT NAME: TIER_ID 

LONG NAME: TIER_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: PDE and plan characteristics (derived) 

VALUES: Null 
1–7 = The tier on the plan's formulary
